parameters.command: ssh -p 36000 root@10.20.47.14 "cd /root/ds-scheduler-gateway && if git remote get-url internal >/dev/null 2>&1; then git remote set-url internal git@git.kuainiujinke.com:jiangchuanchen/ds-scheduler-gateway.git; else git remote add internal git@git.kuainiujinke.com:jiangchuanchen/ds-scheduler-gateway.git; fi && GIT_SSH_COMMAND='ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null' git fetch --prune internal main && git checkout -B main internal/main && git reset --hard internal/main && git clean -fd"

ssh root@10.20.10.12 "cd /root/ds-scheduler-gateway && if git remote get-url gateway-github >/dev/null 2>&1; then git remote set-url gateway-github https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/ds-scheduler-gateway.git; else git remote add gateway-github https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/ds-scheduler-gateway.git; fi && git fetch --prune gateway-github main && git checkout -B main gateway-github/main && git reset --hard gateway-github/main && git clean -fd"
